channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Tanker Fleet
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Multiple urgent vacancies are available on a tanker operating under a Saudi Aramco project. Positions include Chief Engineer, Second Officer, Crane Operator, Able Seaman (AB), and Oiler. Minimum experience requirements vary by rank, with specific COC and certificate validity needed. Contract durations are 3 months or 180 days on/off unpaid. Joining is upon visa and approval issuance or as soon as possible. Salary is to be discussed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Vacancies on Tanker at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Gladstone, Australia
Description:

Experienced Chief Engineers and Second Engineers are sought for LNG vessels equipped with TFDE engines. Embarkation is scheduled for July 25th in Gladstone, Australia, for a 3-month contract. This role offers a significant opportunity to advance your career within the maritime industry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer 2nd Engineer Job - LNG Tanker at Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement CSC Romania

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Able Seaman is sought for a Chemical/Oil Product Tanker with a deadweight of 34700 DWT. Candidates require tanker experience and a good command of English. The contract duration is 3 months, with an immediate joining date. The daily salary offered is 106 EUR.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AB Vacancy on Chemical/Oil Product Tanker at Nedcon Maritime Manpower Supply

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for Master, Second Officer, Second Engineer, and Third Engineer positions on Oil & Chemical Tankers ranging from 40,000 to 80,000 DWT. Candidates must have relevant tanker experience and a valid Turkish Seaman's Book. Joining is expected in July or August.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, Officer, Engineer Jobs on Oil/Chemical Tankers at Pera Shipping

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

A Chief Engineer with at least 2 years of experience on tanker vessels is required for a project operating under Saudi Aramco. Candidates must hold a Chief Engineer COC (STCW Code III/2) – CE Unlimited. The contract duration is 3 months on/off unpaid. Joining is upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance. Salary is to be discussed. All certificates must be valid for at least 12 months, and the passport for a minimum of 1 year.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Vacancy on Tanker at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Pakistani crew are urgently sought for an Aframax oil tanker. Vacancies include Bosun, Able Seaman, Fitter, and Oiler positions. Salaries range from USD 850 to USD 1,900 depending on the role. Candidates must possess valid STCW certificates and relevant tanker experience. Sign-on date is to be determined.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Aframax Oil Tanker Crew Vacancies - Pakistan at MarineX Globals

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Painter/Cleaner position is available on a tanker vessel (29,000+ GRT). The role involves ballast tank mud cleaning and deck cosmetic maintenance. Candidates must possess a valid US Visa and have previous experience in ballast tank cleaning and deck maintenance on tanker vessels. The contract duration is 6–8 months.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Painter/Cleaner Job on Tanker Vessel at Meridian Marine Management Pvt. Ltd.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Chemical Tanker crew are sought for immediate joining. This role offers a rejoining bonus for officers, pension funds, health insurance, onboard internet, and gym equipment. Michelin Star Chef support is also provided. Apply online or via email to join the fleet.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chemical Tanker Crew Openings at Elburg Shipmanagement Philippines Inc.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer is required for a 27,000 GRT chemical/oil tanker. A White CoC is mandatory for this position. The salary offered is USD 6,000–6,500. Further details regarding joining date and contract duration are available upon inquiry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Vacancy on Chemical/Oil Tanker at IRPSL Holder

item.description:
Location: Great Yarmouth / River Humber
Description:

A Master (200gt minimum, CTV/Windfarm experience) is needed for night shifts supporting an SOV near Great Yarmouth, starting August 4th for 3 weeks. A Chief Mate with tanker endorsement and bunker experience is required for the River Humber, starting August 28th for 2 weeks training followed by a 4 weeks on/off rotation. Travel is paid for the Chief Mate position. Relevant certificates must be revalidated.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Chief Mate Jobs - CTV/Tanker Vessels at Rix Shipping
